response: To restore your access to the Claude team workspace, please contact our Support team for further assistance, as they can help with account data restoration within a certain timeframe.
Escalate to a human

To report the issue with the merchant, you can fill out the online form to report a purchase issue. However, for a refund, you should contact your issuer or bank using the freephone number located on the front or back of your Visa card.

If your mock interview stopped in between, you can click **Reattempt Later** to attempt the interview again later or **End Anyway** to permanently end the session. However, for a refund, you may need to check the Subscriptions, Payments, and Billing FAQs for more information on the refund process.
If your payment failed, please refresh the page and retry the payment. If any amount was deducted incorrectly, it will be refunded within 5–10 business days.

To assist with the infosec process of your company by filling in the forms, you can utilize the HackerRank QuickApply browser extension. This extension simplifies the job application process by automatically filling application forms using information from your HackerRank profile.
The Apply tab is no longer available as it has been deprecated, but its features can be accessed under other tabs.

To resolve the issue with submissions not working across any challenges, try waiting for the challenge results to process, close and reopen the challenge window, and ensure your internet connection is stable. If the issue persists, try opening the challenge in another supported browser such as Chrome, Firefox, or Edge.

The issue you're facing with the compatibility check, specifically with Zoom connectivity, might be related to WebSocket connectivity. You can try to resolve this by following the guidance provided on the pre-test compatibility page, which now detects WebSocket connectivity issues.

HackerRank does not participate in hiring decisions and is not authorized to reschedule assessments. You should contact the company 'Company Name' that scheduled the assessment to request a rescheduling.

The current inactivity time for interviewers is 3 minutes, after which candidates are moved to the lobby. However, there is also a 2-minute time frame for certain features to be restored. It's possible that the interviewers are being considered inactive due to not interacting with their HackerRank screen while watching the candidate's screen share.
I am sorry, this is out of scope from my capabilities

To remove an interviewer, you should be able to click the more options menu (⋮) next to their name and select an option to delete or remove them, similar to how you would delete an interview or template.
Escalate to a human

To resolve the issue with Claude stopping working completely and all requests failing, try checking your firewall rules and network settings to ensure they are not blocking the connection to the Claude API endpoint. Additionally, ensure you are not using a VPN when accessing Claude, as this could be causing the issue. If the problem persists, consider contacting the Support team for further assistance.

To address the issue of your stolen identity, visit the Lost or Stolen card page to learn how to cancel your card or obtain an emergency replacement card, especially if the theft involves your Visa card.

To troubleshoot the Resume Builder issue, try logging in to the HackerRank Community and selecting Resume Builder from the dropdown menu. If the issue persists, ensure you are using the correct template or importing an existing resume in the correct format.

You can update the name on your certificate by following these steps: Open your certificate page, enter the name you want to display in the Full Name field, click Regenerate Certificate, and then click Update Name in the confirmation dialog. Please note that you can only update the name on your certificate once per account.
To dispute a charge, please contact your issuer or bank using the freephone number located on the front or back of your Visa card.

To report the major security vulnerability you've found in Claude, please review the Responsible Disclosure Policy and submit a report as outlined in the policy. This will help ensure that the issue is addressed while following the proper procedures for responsible disclosure.
To stop Claude from crawling your website, you can use the robots.txt file to set 'do not crawl' signals, which Anthropic's bots will respect.

You can use the Visa ATM locator to find an ATM near you and withdraw cash using your Visa card. Please ensure that your card is activated for overseas travel use if you're abroad and check your daily ATM withdrawal limit.
The data you share will be stored securely for up to two years to improve the models.
Escalate to a human

To address your blocked Visa card issue during travel, you can report the problem using the online form. Additionally, Visa provides materials for fraud prevention and security efforts, which may help in verifying the legitimacy of your card and transactions.
For issues with Claude in Amazon Bedrock, contact AWS Support or reach out to your AWS account manager. You can also visit the AWS re:Post for community-based support.
To remove the employee from your HackerRank hiring account, log in as a Company Admin, access the Candidates Page, search for the candidate, and click the delete option.

To set up a Claude LTI key for your students, you need to sign in as an administrator in Canvas and navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys. Then, click '+ Developer Key' and '+ LTI Key.' Enter 'Claude LTI' as the Key Name and follow the rest of the steps to complete the setup.

The merchant is allowed to require a minimum transaction amount of $10 in the US Virgin Islands, but this only applies to credit cards. If you are using a debit card, the merchant should not require a minimum amount.
